label: Firmware Firebase Backend
info: Kiosk-facing firmware metadata endpoints. Preserves existing Besiter/FOTA response shape {code,type,data,msg,time}; data is filename,size,url. Proxies active release lookup to Firebase function firmware_httpResolveRelease.

name: Optional: set flow.firmwareResolveUrl to override the Firebase function URL.
Build Firebase resolver request
Return kiosk firmware metadata
Return firmware error
